policy: Only entries with fetch_kind "http_get" may be downloaded by fetch_public_compliance_corpus.py. ISO/IEC and proprietary audit frameworks are listed under purchase_only for human sourcing.

sources.title: NIST Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0)
sources.notes: Canonical US AI governance framing; aligns with agentic systems and documentation expectations.

sources.title: NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0
sources.notes: Broad security outcomes vocabulary useful when mapping gates and evidence.

sources.title: NIST SP 800-171 Rev 3 — Protecting CUI in Nonfederal Systems
sources.notes: Useful when systems touch defense-adjacent or regulated supplier workflows.

sources.title: Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) — consolidated English HTML
sources.notes: Large page; use --include-large to fetch. Official consolidated legal text.

sources.title: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 (EU AI Act) — consolidated English HTML
sources.notes: Large page; use --include-large to fetch. Map excerpts carefully for training data licensing.

sources.title: AICPA Trust Services Criteria (SOC 2)
sources.notes: Full TSC document set is not freely redistributable; purchase or license via AICPA / CPA firm access.

sources.title: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Information Security Management
sources.notes: ISO texts require purchase; do not commit pirated PDFs to the repo.

sources.title: ISO/IEC 42001:2023 AI Management System
sources.notes: Purchase-only; useful alignment reference once obtained outside this automated fetch.
